---
title: "test_telemetry.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\test_telemetry.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.10
style_score: 5.73
intel_score: 3.14
overall_score: 4.26
---

## Intent
The `test_telemetry.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_trace. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_trace. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [requests](file://requests)

### Exports
- `test_trace`
